title: Survival Enhanced+
description: Survival, beautifully upgraded! Explore breathtaking and diverse new landscapes, discover vibrant and unique settlements, and immerse yourself in stunning visuals (shaders & resource packs included!). It's Minecraft, Plus!
body:
# **MINECRAFT ENHANCED+**

Tired of the same old Minecraft grind? Prepare to dive into a world that's been meticulously crafted to enhance every moment of your survival journey! **Minecraft Enhanced+** transforms the familiar into the fantastic, blending breathtaking new landscapes, vibrant communities, and stunning visuals for an adventure that feels both exhilaratingly new and deeply true to the spirit of Minecraft.

Explore a realm dynamically sculpted by **[Terralith]([https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith))**, unveiling awe-inspiring vistas, incredibly diverse biomes, and majestic terrain that will redefine your understanding of Minecraft's beauty. As you venture forth, discover lively, expanded villages and impressive new structures courtesy of **[Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)**, bringing a fresh sense of life and discovery to the world's inhabitants.

With **Minecraft Enhanced+**, every sunrise paints a new masterpiece across your screen, every cave system holds deeper mystery, and every expedition promises unforgettable sights. We've carefully curated a suite of visual and gameplay enhancements to ensure your world isn't just bigger, but more beautiful and engaging too.

Get ready to embark on your most memorable survival adventure yet!

### **✨Resourcepacks & Shaderspacks:**
This modpack is packed with texture packs that enhance the player's visual experience. Use it with a shader pack from the modpack and experience a great view.

### **⚠️OPTIONAL⚠️:**
To smooth out some of the survival grind and add convenient feature:
* **[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/)** - allows you to make a modified texture pack & data packs, with improvements chosen specifically by you.
---
## **MODS SECTION**
### ⚙️ Performance & Optimization
**These mods focus on improving game performance, reducing lag, and making your Minecraft experience smoother.**

* **[Athena](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena)** - Optimizes model loading, reducing stutter and improving performance.
* **[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)** - Replaces the vanilla F3 debug screen with a more customizable and readable version.
* **[Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)** - Fixes a huge variety of vanilla bugs, often improving stability and performance.
* **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)** - Stops rendering entities that are hidden from view, boosting FPS.
* **[Euphoria Patcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patcher)** - Applies various patches to other mods for compatibility or performance.
* **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferritecore)** - Reduces memory usage by optimizing how block states and other data are handled.
* **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)** - Optimizes immediate mode rendering, which can improve FPS in many situations.
* **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** - Enables shader pack support for Fabric, allowing for stunning visual enhancements.
* **[Lazy Shuffle](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazyshuffle)** - Optimizes recipe lookups for the recipe book and crafting.
* **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)** - A general-purpose performance mod that optimizes many game mechanics without changing vanilla behavior.
* **[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)** - A collection of performance improvements and bug fixes for modern Minecraft versions.
* **[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)** - Adds more aggressive culling for various game elements to improve performance.
* **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)** - Optimizes the vanilla noise generator for faster world generation.
* **[Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-crashes)** - Provides more detailed crash reports and attempts to allow you to continue playing after some types of crashes.
* **[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)** - Provides additional graphics options for the Sodium optimization mod.
* **[SmoothGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothgui)** - Aims to improve performance related to GUI rendering.
* **[Sodium (Implied)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** - A powerful rendering engine replacement that drastically improves FPS. (Necessary for some listed mods).
* **[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)** - Adds dynamic lighting for items, compatible with Sodium.
* **[Very Shady Name Simplifier (VSNS)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vsns)** - Simplifies shader pack names in the selection menu.

### 🎨 Visual & Client-Side Enhancements
**Mods that enhance the game's appearance, sounds, and overall atmosphere without altering core gameplay mechanics.**

* **[Ambient Environment](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambient-environment)** - Adds subtle environmental information to the F3 screen.
* **[Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)** - Replaces the flat bed model with a 3D version.
* **[Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display)** - Improves the way player ping is displayed in the player list.
* **[Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)** - Improves the third-person camera, making it more dynamic and customizable.
* **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** - Adds support for connected textures, similar to OptiFine.
* **[Custom Splash Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/customsplashscreen)** - Allows customization of the loading splash screen.
* **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** - Allows resource packs to define more complex entity models.
* **[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-texture-features)** - Adds support for emissive and other advanced entity texture properties.
* **[Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement)** - Enhances the visual and auditory effects of explosions.
* **[First Person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/firstperson-model)** - Renders your own player model in first-person view.
* **[Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlighter)** - Visually highlights the block or entity you are looking at.
* **[Highlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlight)** - Provides an outline highlight for targeted blocks and entities.
* **[Immersive Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivelanterns)** - Makes lanterns look like they are hanging or placed more realistically.
* **[Infinite Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music)** - Plays background music continuously without long pauses.
* **[Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)** - Adds a visual effect when bubble columns from soul sand pop.
* **[Music Notification (or similar)](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-duration-reducer)** - Displays the current music track.
* **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)** - Adds more player animations like crawling, climbing, etc.
* **[Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)** - Makes rain particles more realistic and visually appealing.
* **[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)** - Adds dynamic and block-dependent footstep sounds.
* **[3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)** - Renders the second skin layer in 3D.
* **[SkinShuffle](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinshuffle)** - Allows shuffling through different skins for entities or players.
* **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)** - Adds realistic sound reverberation and attenuation.
* **[Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sounds)** - Adds more ambient and action-based sounds to the game.
* **[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)** - Adds various cosmetic particle effects to enhance visual feedback.
* **[Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes)** - Adds particle wake effects behind entities moving in water.
* **[Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)** - Makes capes animate realistically.
* **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)** - Adds a dedicated zoom key, similar to OptiFine's zoom.

### 🌍 World Generation & Structures
**These mods change how your Minecraft world is shaped, adding new biomes, structures, and overhauling terrain generation.**

* **[Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)** - Adds a plethora of new, unique biomes to the Overworld and Nether.
* **[Structory: Canyon](https://modrinth.com/mod/canyon)** - Adds new canyon structures or enhances existing ones.
* **[Huge Structure Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/huge-structure-blocks)** - A utility mod for developers or advanced builders to work with very large structures.
* **[Repurposed Structures (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures)** - Adds many new variants of vanilla structures and new, unique structures to discover.
* **[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)** - A spectacular world generation mod that overhauls biomes and terrain without adding new blocks.

### ⚔️ Gameplay Enhancements & Content
**Mods that introduce new mechanics, items, blocks, creatures, or systems that significantly alter or expand the gameplay experience.**

* **[Accessories Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)** - A mod that allows for equippable cosmetic accessories.
* **[Bedrockify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockify)** - Implements various features from Minecraft Bedrock Edition into Java Edition.
* **[BeRightBack (BRB)](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb)** - Displays an AFK status or performs actions when you're away.
* **[Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on)** - Allows you to pick up and carry tile entities (like chests) and smaller mobs.
* **[Comforts (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts)** - Adds sleeping bags and hammocks for portable sleep and setting spawn points.
* **[Double Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-doors)** - Automatically opens both doors when one part of a double door is opened.
* **[Drop Confirm](https://modrinth.com/mod/drop-confirm)** - Adds a confirmation step before dropping items to prevent accidental drops.
* **[Falling Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree)** - Makes trees fall over realistically when the bottom block is chopped.
* **[Easy Magic / Vanilla Excavators](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic)** - Provides 3x3 tools.
* **[Forgiving Void](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgivingvoid)** - Prevents items from being destroyed in the void, or saves players from void death.
* **[Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted)** - Adds a variety of detailed furniture and decorative blocks.
* **[Interactic](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactic)** - Improves item interaction, such as right-clicking items into blocks from a distance.
* **[InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove)** - Allows you to move around while having inventories or GUIs open.
* **[Lenient Death](https://modrinth.com/mod/lenientdeath)** - Makes death less punishing, perhaps by keeping inventory or experience.
* **[Lucky's Cozy Home: Refurnished](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckys-cozy-home-refurnished)** - Adds a collection of furniture and decorative items.
* **[Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/melody)** - Adds musical features or instruments to the game.
* **[Mob Filter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobfilter)** - Allows fine-grained control over mob spawning using various rules.
* **[Most Recently Used (MRU) Server List](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru)** - Sorts the multiplayer server list by most recently joined.
* **[Patchouli (Necronomicon)](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)** - Provides in-game guidebooks for mods.
* **[Nether Portal Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherportalfix)** - Improves the logic for Nether portal linking to prevent issues.
* **[Paladin's Furniture Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-furniture)** - Adds a variety of furniture items.
* **[Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)** - Library/enhancement for particle effects, used by `Particular`.
* **[Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular)** - Allows for highly customizable particle effects.
* **[Sit (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sit)** - Allows players to sit on slabs and stairs.
* **[Sophisticated Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core)** & **[Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage)** - Adds advanced, upgradeable storage solutions.
* **[Sounds Be Gone!](https://modrinth.com/mod/sounds-be-gone)** - Allows you to selectively mute annoying or unwanted sounds.
* **[Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)** - Populates the world with new villages, structures, and villagers.
* **[Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelers-backpack)** - Adds versatile backpacks with extra features.
* **[WTHIT (What The Hell Is That)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit)** - Displays information about the block/entity you are looking at.
* **[Waystones (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)** - Adds craftable waystones for teleportation.
* **[Yeetus Experimentus](https://modrinth.com/mod/yeetus-experimentus)** - A fun mod that allows you to "yeet" (throw) entities.

### 💡 Quality of Life (QoL) & UI
**Mods that offer convenient utilities, improve user interface elements, or streamline common tasks without adding major new content.**

* **[Advancement Plaques (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementplaques)** - Replaces standard advancement popups with stylish "plaques".
* **[BindCommands](https://modrinth.com/mod/bindcommands)** - Allows binding commands to keys.
* **[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)** - Improves keybind management with search and conflict detection.
* **[CraftPresence](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftpresence)** - Displays your Minecraft status on Discord via Rich Presence.
* **[Default Options (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/defaultoptions)** - Allows modpack creators to ship default game options/keybinds.
* **[Global Data Pack & Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/global-data-packs)** - Allows global loading of data/resource packs.
* **[Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-items-jei)** - Item and recipe viewer.
* **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** - In-game mod list and config access.
* **[Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)** - Inventory mouse shortcuts.
* **[Night Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/night-config)** - Configuration library used by some mods.
* **[Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel)** - Radial ping menu for multiplayer communication.
* **[Resource Pack Overrides](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcepackoverrides)** - More control over resource pack layering.
* **[Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)** - Makes more GUIs searchable.
* **[SkinRestorer (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinrestorer)** - Restores skins for offline servers/players.
* **[TooltipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix)** - Prevents tooltips from running off-screen.
* **[Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)** - Highly customizable minimap.
* **[Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)** - Full-screen map of explored areas.
